title: Local government reorganisation: letter to the leaders of the borough councils of Reigate and Banstead, and Crawley
body: "On 17 June 2025, the Minister of State for Local Government and English Devolution, Jim McMahon MP OBE, wrote to the leaders of the borough councils of Reigate and Banstead, and Crawley to inform them that their joint submission would not be consulted upon as part of the Surrey local government reorganisation consultation. "
